## 🐛 Fixes

- **Stop is now reliable.** Ending a meeting always tears down transcription — the session can no longer linger or keep transcribing after you press Stop, even if the network stalls during finalization.
- **Hardened meeting start/stop.** Rapid clicks can't open overlapping sessions, and closing the window mid-meeting cleanly stops capture instead of leaving it recording in the background.
- Internal: dev-mode cleanup for the live transcription listeners.

_Cloud edition also moves to the parley.tw API domain._
